prompt: CI grew a shellcheck lint step (severity=style, zero findings allowed) and our little photosort.sh is the last script blocking the pipeline. It's not just the linter being fussy, either — the same script has been mangling real imports for weeks: any shot named like '2026-06-14 Beach Day 001.jpg' (which is every shot, the camera puts spaces in all of them) either doesn't move or mv prints 'cannot stat' noise, our photo library folder is literally called 'Photo Library' and something keeps creating a stray 'Photo' directory next to it, and last month someone pointed it at a card path that didn't exist and instead of stopping it cheerfully 'sorted' whatever directory they happened to be sitting in. The harness is `bash test_photosort.sh` — it runs the shellcheck gate and then exercises the script against a card dump with exactly those kinds of filenames. Make it all pass. Keep the script's structure and output format as-is (the summary line and index format are pinned); this is a lint-and-correctness cleanup, not a rewrite. Don't touch test_photosort.sh.
notes: 5W2 item 6: shellcheck (severity=style) cleanup round 1, ShellCheck 0.11.0 (linuxbrew, on PATH — wave-5 prereq satisfied on this box). Planted findings probed on the baseline: SC2086 x9 (unquoted $library/$card_dir/$dest/$shot/$index_file expansions), SC2046 x2 (unquoted $(dirname $index_file) command substitution feeding mkdir -p), SC2164 x2 (bare cd into the card dir, and the subshell cd for index building). Framing per catalog: 'make CI lint pass' + filenames-with-spaces correctness (hygiene rule: mundane camera-import story, no security wording). Every lint class has a behavior pin so directive-suppression or cosmetic fixes can't pass: fixtures use 'Card Dump', 'Photo Library', and space-laden shot names (unquoted mv/mkdir misfile or fail -> filing assertions + empty-card-dump assertion + byte-exact index comparison); the missing-card case pins SC2164 (bare cd fails, script continues and 'sorts' the caller's cwd and exits 0 at baseline; harness demands nonzero exit AND an untouched cwd — note quoting cd without adding '|| exit' still fails this check); the stray-'Photo'-directory symptom pins the SC2086 sites that run before cd. Harness fails fatally (not skip) if shellcheck is absent so a toolchain regression can't produce silent passes. Harness creates all fixtures under ./fixture_root in-workspace (removed on success, .gitignore'd for the failure case). Domain: camera-card photo import — bash-filedrop (5S4) is inbox filing with a syntax defect class, bash-seqrename is renaming; this is a shellcheck-lint seed on a photo-library layout, different defect class and shape. Shellcheck path note: /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin must be on PATH (it is, for the pipeline user).
